headline: Missouri Sues CoinFlip Over $1M Crypto Scam Allegations

article.title: Missouri AG sues crypto ATM operator CoinFlip ‘for enabling scams’
article.summary: The lawsuit followed the launch of a December 2025 investigation by Missouri authorities into several crypto ATM companies, citing “deceptive fee structures” and scams.

article.title: Coinbase expands branded stablecoin infrastructure business with Flipcash USDF launch
article.summary: The launch marks Coinbase’s latest push into white-label stablecoin infrastructure for businesses building branded digital payment and settlement systems.

headline: Musk Ally Stands to Gain $2B in SpaceX IPO

article.title: Musk Ally Gracias Stands to Make Billions Off SpaceX IPO
article.summary: Antonio Gracias, the founder of Valor Equity Partners and a longtime Elon Musk ally, controls a 7.3% stake in SpaceX, making him the second-largest holder after Musk himself that will earn the investor a giant windfall.

headline: $40B REIT Merger Looms for AvalonBay, Equity

article.title: AvalonBay, Equity Residential Said to Near Mega-REIT Tie-Up
article.summary: AvalonBay Communities Inc. and Equity Residential are nearing a deal that will see two of the biggest real estate investment trusts by value combine, people familiar with the matter said.

headline: $100M Crypto Exposed to Shai-Hulud Malware Threat

article.title: Shai-Hulud: What to Know About the Malware Spreading Through Software Pipelines
article.summary: The Shai-Hulud supply-chain malware campaign is exploiting the automated systems developers trust to publish software safely.

headline: Musk's SpaceX Files $1B AI-Driven IPO Listing

article.title: SpaceX IPO Filing Shows Musk Building an AI and Space Infrastructure Giant
article.summary: The rocket maker’s IPO filing outlines billions in AI spending, Starship development, and Elon Musk’s effort to combine launch systems, satellite internet, social media, and artificial intelligence under one company.

headline: SpaceX Holds $1.45B Bitcoin Amid IPO Plans

article.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX holds $1.45 billion worth of bitcoin as firm looks to go public
article.summary: A stockpile of over 18,000 would make Elon Musk's SpaceX the seventh-largest Bitcoin holder, ahead of Coinbase.

headline: Bitcoin Plunges 10% Amid Extremely Bearish Sentiment Shift

article.title: CryptoQuant says bitcoin mirrors 2022 bear market pattern as sentiment turns ‘extremely bearish’
article.summary: Bitcoin’s recent rally hit resistance at the 200-day MA near $82,400, a pattern CryptoQuant said is similar to the March 2022 bear market.

headline: SpaceX Aims for $100B IPO Filing This Year

article.title: Musk’s SpaceX sets out plans for biggest IPO in history
article.summary: Satellite and AI company to list on Nasdaq under symbol SPCX

article.title: OpenAI readies IPO filing to list as soon as September
article.summary: AI lab is preparing for $1tn listing with bankers Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley and lawyers at Cooley
